title: Fixed #36488 -- use & separator when merging query strings in RedirectView
review_signals: Reviewer suggested replacing inline percent-format separator logic with an explicit urlparse(url).query branch.
Reviewer said the change looked good with a suggestion.
Maintainer closed this PR because a follow-up PR continued the review feedback.
expected_sergeant_findings: Query-string merge logic should use explicit URL query detection instead of checking for a raw question mark.
Regression tests cover existing destination query strings and incoming request query strings.
Follow-up review feedback should be tracked before treating the change as final.
